title: desmodium obcordatum
intro: Desmodium obcordatum, also known as tick trefoil, is a perennial legume native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Desmodium obcordatum include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Desmodium obcordatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
